rag_rules: Fix 'no viable alternative at input' by ensuring AGREE syntax is valid within annex blocks
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or helper declarations in the same annex for AGREE expressions
Align helper declaration types with the types of the expressions they represent
Validate AGREE scalar type names (int, real, bool) match expected AADL types
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Assumptions and guarantees referencing ports must be in component type scopes
anti_patterns: Do not introduce identifiers or types that are not visible or declared in the same annex
Do not use invalid scalar type names like 'integer' or 'boolean' in AGREE declarations
irrelevant_topics: Component implementation annexes and subcomponent port usage
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair strategies
